title: Doff Advanced Formula Foaming Wasp Nest Killer – 300ml – Permethrin & Tetramethrin Wasp Spray – Targets Crawling & Flying Insects - Wasps, Fleas, Moths, Mosquitoes – Indoors & Outdoors
features: POWERFUL WASP KILLER – Effectively eliminate wasp nests with Doff Foaming Wasp Nest Killer Spray. This ready-to-use, advanced wasp killer foam targets wasp nests and other crawling and flying insects like fleas and mosquitoes, providing reliable control for both indoor and outdoor spaces

EASY & VERSATILE APPLICATION – Supplied in a convenient pressurised can, shake and spray this wasp killer spray in short bursts from 60-90cm away to thoroughly wet nests indoors or in the garden. This wasp repellent targets wasps in their nests keeping your home protected and insect-free

FAST-ACTING & RELIABLE – Powered by permethrin and tetramethrin, these highly effective active ingredients deliver a fast knockdown pest control solution when applied in the early morning or late evening. Reapply as needed, avoiding aquatic life, and always use as directed for safe results

COMPREHENSIVE INSECT DEFENCE – Formulated for quick action, this wasp nest destroyer foam ensures efficient results across a wide range of crawling and flying insects, keeping your environment pest-free. The 300ml can provides immediate results and year-round protection for your home and garden

PEST CONTROL EXPERTS – With decades of expert experience, Doff products provide quality-crafted, dependable pest solutions. Proudly made in the UK, our household pest controls offer proven performance, helping to maintain a clean, safe and comfortable living space
